---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who hits it and when?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches the public API, sketch the proposed surface.

```kotlin
// proposed API, if applicable
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse.

## Fit check

- Does this align with the goals in `docs/PRD.md`?
- Is it listed as a non-goal or a later/maybe item in `docs/roadmap.md`?

## Additional context

Anything else — prior art in other libraries, links, etc.
